hero.name: Said Alhajri
hero.intro: I build practical web and mobile products with a focus on performance, clean UX, and maintainable systems.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I have 12 years of development experience across frontend, backend, and mobile apps. I enjoy building products from concept to production and improving developer workflows along the way.

projects.title: ManazlApp
projects.description: Rental service platform for private properties in Oman with booking-style features.

projects.title: ShoflyTawseel
projects.description: Delivery service platform for personal carriers with search, map, and courier dashboard.

projects.title: Shiftdays
projects.description: Shift calendar app that highlights work cycles and simplifies schedule tracking.

contact.text: If you have a product idea or need help shipping faster, feel free to reach out.
